parsed_review.summary: CP00-870 is a clean, internally consistent descriptor-only RP28 Marketplace P09 Claude-review packet secondary-workflow + permission/audit bridge pack (40 units, RP28.P09.M04.S01-RP28.P09.M05.S20, risk B). All changed implementation files were inspected via Read/Grep/Glob (registry.js, validators.js, test/model.test.js, contract JSON, README, validate-rp28 script) plus the live closeout-pack-plan, manifest, and the review hardening harness. Coverage is exact and enforced: deliverable distribution (claude_review 6 / security_audit 4 / test 2 / ui 2 / implementation 26), phase (RP28.P09:40), micro-phase (M04:20, M05:20), micro-title (Secondary Workflow Slice:20, Permission And Audit Binding:20), and per-section row titles (CLAUDE_REVIEW_ROWS.slice(0,20)) all reconcile with the live plan entry and the manifest unit list; validateMarketplaceCp870ClaudeReviewPermissionAuditBridgeCoverage checks each against MARKETPLACE_CP870_REQUIREMENTS. The descriptor validator independently re-checks every row for descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, and absence of connector secrets/OAuth/prompt-completion/real-client-data/permission-detail/audit-body, and rejects any row that opens marketplace runtime (app submission, permission review, policy check, tenant install, app update, install receipt, connector runtime, custom AI app runtime) or writes permission/audit/product state. Authority boundary holds: claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true with runtime deferred to CP00-871. Hermes packet emits_runtime_receipt=false and writes_product_state=false (deterministic control-plane review packet/receipt handling only, not product runtime); Claude packet read_only=true and promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false. MARKETPLACE_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION (all guard flags false) is spread into the descriptor, and tests assert app_submission_executed/permission_decision_written/audit_event_written=false and case-set row_count=40. The production_ready_flag is scoped to marketplace_claude_review_permission_audit_bridge_descriptor_verified; manifest/command-evidence/construction-inspection all report production_ready=false and runtime_ready=false (no runtime or enterprise-trust overreach), and the pending claude-review-result/construction-inspection/adjudication correctly show no valid review yet recorded (valid_review_receipts:[], invalid_review_attempts:[]). Upstream chain CP00-869 -> CP00-870 -> CP00-871/RP28.P09.M05.S21 is enforced by the validate-rp28 script and the contract projection (latest_pack=CP00-870, projections.cp870 descriptor, validation.valid=true, validation.latest_pack_id=CP00-870). The review harness implements CP178+ hardening (rejects auth failures, 0-byte stdout, malformed JSON, fenced JSON with prose, tool-call-shaped output, permission denials, and missing required fields; closeout_eligible requires PASS/PASS_WITH_FINDINGS and zero P0/P1/P2). Provenance note: command-evidence exit codes (node --check, validate-rp28 script, marketplace tests) are runner-reported and were not independently re-executed in this read-only review; the underlying source-level consistency was verified directly. The two modified progress-control-room files are correctly classified as unrelated_dirty_files_preserved and are out of pack scope. blocks_goal_closeout=false: this CP makes no runtime or enterprise-trust claim, and the human final-approval boundary is expected and outside this receipt. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
